assets.prompt_hint_zh: 第01集边境暴雪风格参考：低调高反差、冷白暴雪、黑石大暗面、旧铁、粗木、雪泥、冻血、暗红火点和真实火光动机。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Episode 01 border-blizzard style reference: low-key high contrast, cold white blizzard, massive blackstone shadow, old iron, rough wood, snow mud, frozen blood, dark red embers and motivated real firelight.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 横屏构图和局部因果板，用于保持战场远景、身体代价近景、战场口令中近景三种不同光影比例下的空间连续性。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Landscape composition and local-causality board for preserving spatial continuity across three different lighting balances: battlefield wide shot, bodily-cost close shot, and battlefield-command close-medium shot.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 锁喉关外墙序幕场景卡，锁定黑石墙、墙头警钟架、门闩、枪线、拒马和墙外攻城方向。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Suohou Gate outer wall scene card locking blackstone wall, wall-top bell frame, gate bar, spear line, barricades and exterior siege direction.

composition_layers.foreground: wall-top parapet and bell-side working space
composition_layers.midground: defenders, bell frame, gate mechanism and spear line
composition_layers.background: outer battlefield, barricades, siege pressure and mountains

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 骨钟、断矛、冻血、裂缝和残缺淡金旧日月刻痕的道具参考；不可当作视频首帧。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Prop reference for bone bell, broken spear, frozen blood, cracks and faint broken old sun-moon traces; not a video first frame.

composition_layers.foreground: bone bell surface, cracks, frozen blood and old mark details

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 薛临墙第01集边墙序幕状态卡：黑发束髻、短须、灰石厚衬袄、旧甲片、粗麻墙巾、冻裂手和低声实际命令状态。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Xue Linqiang episode 01 border prologue state card: tied black hair, short beard, grey padded coat, old armor plates, coarse wall scarf, cracked hands and practical low-command posture.

composition_layers.foreground: Xue Linqiang identity, face, hands and wardrobe material details

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 北境攻城剪影状态卡，只用于墙外兽族联盟远景、巨角、毛皮、盾面和火雪分离参考。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Northern siege silhouette state card, used only for exterior beast-alliance distance, horn, fur, shield and fire-snow separation reference.

conditioning.operator_note: Must be loaded as an image node. Prompt text mentioning E01_C020 is not enough for ComfyUI to use this image.

composition_layers.foreground: siege silhouette, horn and shield readability

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 年轻灰墙军户序幕状态卡，用于扶钟、断矛、冻血和雪墙可读性；不可当作视频首帧。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Young grey-wall soldier prologue state card for bell support, broken spear, frozen blood and snow-wall readability; not a video first frame.

composition_layers.foreground: young soldier identity, face, hands and blood-contact detail

assets.prompt_hint_zh: SC001-SH001 首帧：攻城方斜后侧低机位，三分之四看同一面锁喉关黑石墙；远处墙头小钟只是锚点，兽族/伴生兽由已加载的 C020、C021、E01_C020 参考图节点约束。
assets.prompt_hint_en: SC001-SH001 updated first frame: low diagonal rear-side siege angle, three-quarter view of the Suohou Gate blackstone wall; foreground shows beast siege shoulders, old iron armor plates, torn banners, brazier fire, snow-mud footsteps and one partial beast spine or horn, with the beast tide pushing from front-left toward the gate at rear-right, the gate not centered and ranks not symmetrical, while the wall-top bone bell and defenders are only small silhouettes. Beast troops and companion beasts are constrained by loaded C020, C021 and E01_C020 reference image nodes.

composition_layers.foreground: diagonal rear-side beast siege shoulders, torn banners, old iron plates, brazier fire, snow-mud footsteps and partial beast spine or horn
composition_layers.midground: blackstone wall and gate set off-center along a diagonal siege line
composition_layers.background: small wall-top bone bell and defender silhouettes, mountains, snow haze and distant firelines

assets.prompt_hint_zh: SC001-SH001 终帧：同一墙面斜爬上墙头后45度转向；单墙、单钟架、单钟，半幅墙头守军、半幅俯看城外兽族朝墙攻来。
assets.prompt_hint_en: SC001-SH001 updated last frame: wall-top medium-near composition, camera landed at the blackstone parapet outer edge or wall-top human height, looking diagonally down outside the wall; bone bell and frame sit on the left or upper middle, blackstone parapet, snow-mud wall surface, defender shoulders, cracked hands, spear or gate-bar details are clear, two to four defenders steady the spear line, and the exterior beast tide, barricades, beast parts, firelines, smoke columns and blizzard remain visible below on a diagonal.

composition_layers.foreground: bone bell, bell frame, blackstone parapet, snow-mud wall surface, defender shoulders, cracked hands and spear or gate-bar details
composition_layers.midground: two to four wall-top defenders bracing the spear line after impact
composition_layers.background: exterior beast tide, barricades, partial beasts, firelines, smoke columns and blizzard visible below on a diagonal

assets.prompt_hint_zh: SC001-SH002 首帧：同一墙头同一口钟旁，年轻军户扶住破钟，旧徽几乎被手和裂缝遮住。
assets.prompt_hint_en: SC001-SH002 first frame: young soldier holds the cracked bell; frozen blood, broken spear, old mark and exterior battlefield layers are clear.

composition_layers.foreground: young soldier, cracked bone bell, blooded hands and broken spear
composition_layers.background: outer siege field below the wall and blizzard

assets.prompt_hint_zh: SC001-SH003 首帧：同一墙头同一口钟旁，薛临墙压住女墙并把注意力拉回门线和枪线。
assets.prompt_hint_en: SC001-SH003 first frame: Xue Linqiang presses the wall seam in the same wall-top space; bell, spear line, defenders and exterior battlefield remain readable.

composition_layers.foreground: Xue Linqiang, cracked hand, parapet and bell-side space
composition_layers.midground: bone bell, spear line and defenders on wall top
composition_layers.background: outer battlefield, siege forces, snow and fire points

conditioning.operator_note: Use this image to preserve multiple beast soldier types. Do not use it as a video first frame.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 北境伴生兽关系母卡：R001-R004 中伴生兽必须继承猛犸、岩背犀/牦牛、霜狼等多样关系。

conditioning.operator_note: Use this image to preserve companion-beast variety and handler relationships. Do not use it as a video first frame.

asset_metadata_warning: E01_R001-E01_R004 are generated 3840x2160 same-space SC001 candidate reference frames and are synchronized with 01/art/asset-index.json and asset-manifest.json as generated_candidate_pending_user_qc. They can be used for ComfyUI shot tests, but should not be marked final approved until user visual QC passes.
